title: Daoist Canon: Liu Yiming: Awakening to the Way (Section 4)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Liu Yiming: Awakening to the Way
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Liu Yiming: Awakening to the Way

translation.text: From the Liu Yiming: Awakening to the Way of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
